title: BingAI gave me a full BTC update in seconds (in my language)
author: SnooHedgehogs560
selftext:
I just tried BingAI on BingX to check Bitcoin’s market condition. Asked in Vietnamese, and it returned a structured report: latest price, recent movement, key levels, and even a soft outlook (“slight correction after a recent peak”).

Way more useful than just showing a chart. This feels like a personal analyst that speaks your language.

Also, they’re running an incentive program if you try it during the AI Launch Campaign.

\#BingXAI
